---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to docs, examples, or the skill package contract
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

Describe the change you want.

## Motivation

Why would this improve the repository or skill?

## Proposed scope

Choose any that apply:

- [ ] documentation only
- [ ] examples only
- [ ] GitHub collaboration templates
- [ ] `SKILL.md` clarification
- [ ] prompt title/index change
- [ ] prompt body change

## Behavior impact

Will this change the runtime behavior?

- [ ] no behavior change intended
- [ ] behavior change intended
- [ ] not sure

If you expect behavior changes, describe them clearly.

## Additional context

Add references, examples, or screenshots if helpful.
